CheckResults.queryText:
/*********
Table Level:  
MEASURE_PERSON_COMPLETENESS
Determine what #/% of persons have at least one record in the cdmTable
Parameters used in this template:
schema = main
cdmTableName = OBSERVATION_PERIOD
**********/
SELECT 
	num_violated_rows, 
	CASE 
		WHEN denominator.num_rows = 0 THEN 0 
		ELSE 1.0*num_violated_rows/denominator.num_rows 
	END AS pct_violated_rows, 
    denominator.num_rows AS num_denominator_rows
FROM
(
	SELECT 
		COUNT(violated_rows.person_id) AS num_violated_rows
	FROM
	(
		/*violatedRowsBegin*/
		SELECT 
			cdmTable.* 
		FROM main.person cdmTable
			LEFT JOIN main.OBSERVATION_PERIOD cdmTable2 
			    ON cdmTable.person_id = cdmTable2.person_id
		WHERE cdmTable2.person_id IS NULL
		/*violatedRowsEnd*/
	) violated_rows
) violated_row_count,
( 
	SELECT 
		COUNT(*) AS num_rows
	FROM main.person cdmTable
) denominator
;
CheckResults.checkDescription: The number and percent of persons in the CDM that do not have at least one record in the OBSERVATION_PERIOD table

CheckResults.queryText:
/*********
Table Level:  
MEASURE_CONDITION_ERA_COMPLETENESS
Determine what #/% of persons have condition_era built successfully 
for persons in condition_occurrence table
Parameters used in this template:
cdmTableName = CONDITION_ERA
**********/
SELECT 
	num_violated_rows, 
	CASE 
		WHEN denominator.num_rows = 0 THEN 0 
		ELSE 1.0*num_violated_rows/denominator.num_rows 
	END AS pct_violated_rows, 
    denominator.num_rows AS num_denominator_rows
FROM
(
	SELECT 
		COUNT(violated_rows.person_id) AS num_violated_rows
	FROM
	(
		/*violatedRowsBegin*/
		SELECT DISTINCT 
		    co.person_id
		FROM main.condition_occurrence co
		LEFT JOIN main.CONDITION_ERA cdmTable 
		    ON co.person_id = cdmTable.person_id
  	    WHERE cdmTable.person_id IS NULL
  	    AND co.condition_concept_id != 0
		/*violatedRowsEnd*/
	) violated_rows
) violated_row_count,
( 
	SELECT 
		COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS num_rows
	FROM main.condition_occurrence co
    WHERE co.condition_concept_id != 0
) denominator
;
CheckResults.checkDescription:
The number and Percent of persons that does not have condition_era built successfully 
for all persons in condition_occurrence

CheckResults.queryText:
/*********
FIELD_FK_DOMAIN
Check that all standard concept IDs belong to the appropriate domain for a given table and field.
Parameters used in this template:
schema = main
vocabDatabaseSchema = main
cdmTableName = CDM_SOURCE
cdmFieldName = CDM_VERSION_CONCEPT_ID
fkDomain = Metadata
**********/
SELECT 
    num_violated_rows, 
    CASE
        WHEN denominator.num_rows = 0 THEN 0 
        ELSE 1.0*num_violated_rows/denominator.num_rows 
    END AS pct_violated_rows, 
    denominator.num_rows AS num_denominator_rows
FROM (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(violated_rows.violating_field) AS num_violated_rows
    FROM (
        /*violatedRowsBegin*/
        SELECT 
            'CDM_SOURCE.CDM_VERSION_CONCEPT_ID' AS violating_field, 
            cdmTable.* 
        FROM main.CDM_SOURCE cdmTable
            LEFT JOIN main.concept co
            ON cdmTable.CDM_VERSION_CONCEPT_ID = co.concept_id
        WHERE co.concept_id != 0 
            AND co.domain_id NOT IN ('Metadata')
        /*violatedRowsEnd*/
    ) violated_rows
) violated_row_count,
( 
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS num_rows
    FROM main.CDM_SOURCE cdmTable
) denominator
;
CheckResults.checkDescription: The number and percent of records that have a value in the CDM_VERSION_CONCEPT_ID field in the CDM_SOURCE table that do not conform to the METADATA domain.

FIELD_IS_STANDARD_VALID_CONCEPT
all standard concept id fields are standard and valid
Parameters used in this template:
schema = main
vocabDatabaseSchema = main
cdmTableName = DEATH
cdmFieldName = DEATH_TYPE_CONCEPT_ID
**********/
SELECT 
	num_violated_rows, 
	CASE 
		WHEN denominator.num_rows = 0 THEN 0 
		ELSE 1.0*num_violated_rows/denominator.num_rows 
	END AS pct_violated_rows, 
    denominator.num_rows AS num_denominator_rows
FROM
(
	SELECT 
		COUNT(violated_rows.violating_field) AS num_violated_rows
	FROM
	(
		/*violatedRowsBegin*/
		SELECT 
			'DEATH.DEATH_TYPE_CONCEPT_ID' AS violating_field, 
			cdmTable.* 
		FROM main.DEATH cdmTable
	  	JOIN main.concept co 
	  	    ON cdmTable.DEATH_TYPE_CONCEPT_ID = co.concept_id
		WHERE co.concept_id != 0 
			AND (
				co.standard_concept != 'S' 
				OR co.invalid_reason IS NOT NULL
				OR co.standard_concept IS NULL
			)
		/*violatedRowsEnd*/
  ) violated_rows
) violated_row_count,
( 
	SELECT 
		COUNT(*) AS num_rows
	FROM main.DEATH cdmTable
	WHERE cdmTable.DEATH_TYPE_CONCEPT_ID IS NOT NULL
) denominator
;
CheckResults.checkDescription: The number and percent of records that do not have a standard, valid concept in the DEATH_TYPE_CONCEPT_ID field in the DEATH table.
